en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid DURF certificate in the Italy DURF Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t

The Italy Single Certificate of Tax Compliance (DURF) is a certificate issued by the Italian Revenue Agency that verifies a company’s compliance with specific tax obligations, including the regular payment of withholding taxes on income from dependent and similar work. Legislative Decree n. 241, Art. 17-bis on Normattiva DURF Application template Contact Info for help on with DURF from Agenzia delle Entrate
Please upload your Single Certificate of Tax Compliance (DURF).
The standard validity period is 4 months from the issue date.
Please enter the expiration date of your Single Certificate of Tax Compliance (DURF).
